# pii_contact corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Phone (international) ===
# E.164 is CC-allow-list gated (Block 7a) and tolerates space/hyphen
# group separators between the country code and the number.
# expect: International Phone (E.164)
+15555550123
# expect: International Phone (E.164)
+61 412 345 678

# expect: Phone Number (UK)
+44 2079460958

# expect: Phone Number (Italy)
+39 3331234567

# expect: Phone Number (France)
+33 1 23 45 67 89

# expect: Phone Number (Germany)
+49 301234567

# expect: Phone Number (Spain)
+34 612345678

# expect: Phone Number (Brazil)
+55 11 91234-5678

# expect: Phone Number (India)
+91 9123456789

# expect: Phone Number (US)
+1 415 555 0123

# === Date of birth ===
# expect: Date of Birth (labeled)
dob: 1985-04-12
